description: An audit has revealed that an incorrect diagnosis code was used on a claim that has already been submitted. A coder needs to correct it.

nodes.task_description: Locate the claim with the incorrect code.

expected_outcome.value: Coder finds the specific claim that needs correction.

nodes.task_description: Review the documentation and determine the correct diagnosis code.

expected_outcome.value: Coder identifies the accurate code that should have been used.

nodes.task_description: Submit a corrected claim to the payer with the updated diagnosis code.

expected_outcome.value: Coder successfully submits a replacement claim to the insurance company.
